body:
## Summary

- **Root cause**: `use-m` always calls `npm show <package> version` for unversioned (i.e., `@latest`) package loads. This registry call fails with **HTTP 403 Forbidden** in GitHub Actions CI after prior `npm install -g` operations modify npm's global config state.
- **Fix**: Pin `command-stream` to `@0.9.4` and `lino-arguments` to `@0.2.5` in all scripts. When a specific version is provided to `use-m`, it skips the `npm show` registry call entirely and uses a local directory cache check instead.
- **Documentation**: Added a full case study analysis in `docs/case-studies/issue-76/README.md` with timeline, root cause evidence, and proposed solutions.
- **Upstream**: Filed https://github.com/link-foundation/use-m/issues/52 to report the 403 CI failure issue to the `use-m` maintainers, and commented on https://github.com/link-foundation/use-m/issues/17 (caching support for `@latest`).

## Files Changed

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `scripts/publish-crate.mjs` | Pin `command-stream@0.9.4`, `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/check-release-needed.mjs` | Pin `command-stream@0.9.4`, `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/version-and-commit.mjs` | Pin `command-stream@0.9.4`, `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/git-config.mjs` | Pin `command-stream@0.9.4`, `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/create-github-release.mjs` | Pin `command-stream@0.9.4`, `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/get-bump-type.mjs` | Pin `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/bump-version.mjs` | Pin `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `scripts/create-changelog-fragment.mjs` | Pin `lino-arguments@0.2.5` |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-76/README.md` | New: full case study with timeline, root cause, evidence |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-76/ci-runs.json` | New: CI run metadata |
| `changelog.d/20260225_190000_fix_ci_npm_registry_403.md` | New: changelog fragment (`bump: patch`) |

## Root Cause Detail

The failing CI run: https://github.com/link-assistant/calculator/actions/runs/22410298646/job/64881763135

```
Error: Command failed: npm show command-stream version
npm error code E403
npm error 403 403 Forbidden - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/command-stream
```

`use-m` v8.13.7's `getLatestVersion()` always calls `npm show <package> version` for `@latest` packages â€” no caching:

```javascript
const getLatestVersion = async (packageName) => {
  const { stdout: version } = await execAsync(`npm show ${packageName} version`);
  return version.trim();
};
```

With a pinned version, `use-m` skips this call:

```javascript
if (version !== 'latest' && await directoryExists(packagePath)) {
  return packagePath; // No npm show call!
}
```

## Test Plan

- [ ] CI should pass on the `auto-release` job after this fix (no more 403 on `npm show command-stream version`)
- [ ] Verify `scripts/publish-crate.mjs` loads `command-stream@0.9.4` correctly
- [ ] Verify changelog fragment is picked up by `get-bump-type.mjs` as a `patch` bump

Closes #76

đź¤– Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

title: fix: pin command-stream and lino-arguments versions to prevent npm 403 errors in CI
